title: Define next-step community-recorded audio workflow for non-TTS languages
notes: Split out of ISSUE-0016 on 2026-05-23 after narrowing ISSUE-0016 to Kok Kaper no-audio/skip-TTS fallback validation only. This issue tracks definition/design of the next-step community-recorded audio workflow for non-TTS languages (data model, roles/permissions, moderation, recording UX, storage/versioning, and integration into audio annotation/compile). See docs/roadmap/low-resource-languages.md section 5.2 for detailed roadmap context.
